name: agent-swarm
description: Intelligent LLM routing and subagent delegation for OpenClaw. Routes each task to the optimal model by tier (FAST, REASONING, CREATIVE, RESEARCH, CODE, QUALITY, VISION), spawns subagents via sessions_spawn, and reduces API costs. Supports parallel multi-task splitting. Rejects prompt-injection patterns in task strings.
author: Austin

config.openrouter_api_key: Required: OpenRouter API key must be configured in OpenClaw platform settings
config.openclaw_json: Reads tools.exec.host and tools.exec.node from openclaw.json (located via OPENCLAW_HOME or ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)

commands.classify: Classify a task into a routing tier
commands.spawn: Generate sessions_spawn parameters for a task
commands.cost: Estimate API cost for a task
